specific_mechanism: Pyrotechnic compositions emit specific spectra: strontium=red, barium=green, copper=blue; ionic excitation transitions determine emission lines
llm_application: LLM sampling-temperature spectra: each temperature level emits characteristic distribution shape; design compositions that produce target spectral mixture for downstream tasks.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes pyrotechnics spectral-allocation mapping as proposed.
